title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kaido, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Orochi, Unknown person #12 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Can you stop talking alike this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's no problem. We will meet in the party venue in a short while.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would like for you all to meet LinLIN.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it seems like she's changing right now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So we will see that later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the one I want to drink with KA/DO-SAN.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to an inconvenience I've kept you all waiting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't the one who called you all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the one who summoned you all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KING...?! is there something you'd like to share with us?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you had known I was the one who called you, you guys would've ignored it right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I mean, you are a group made up of ex-pirate captains.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and you are aiming to become an ALL-Star.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've managed come this far due to our strength.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's normal - if we're eyeing those spots.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You must re-evaluate your strength then!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, let's calm down guys. It's a joyOUS feast day today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: King, why did you summon them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Tell me today's schedule, Bao Huang.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Queen-SAMA is hosting the Golden Kagura music on Stage, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The three ALL-STARS and Master Fukurokuju

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and after that will be LORD kaido and

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and then we will wait for the arrival of the big mom pirate's ship

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: And finally Lord Kaido will make....

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: An important announcement? That's unlike Lord Kaido..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of the biggest pirate alliance in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Animal kingdom pirates headc/mer BAD HUANG

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I was to reveal it now it would bring confusion

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Anyway, your task is the following

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 62 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
